zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Dalton於1422年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Richard Dalton32歲，母親Alice de Clifford52歲。她於1447年之前與William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1483年12月16日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普盧多享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Dalton于1422年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲Richard Dalton32岁，母亲Alice de Clifford52岁。她于1447年之前与William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1483年12月16日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德普盧多享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Dalton was born in 1422, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, Richard Dalton, was 32 and her mother, Alice de Clifford, was 52. She married William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd before 1447. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 16 December 1483, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Dalton est née en 1422, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Dalton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice de Clifford, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd avant 1447. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 décembre 1483, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Dalton 1422 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Dalton 32 und ihre Mutter Alice de Clifford 52. Sie hat vor 1447 William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Dezember 1483 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Dalton è nata il nel 1422 nel Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Richard Dalton, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alice de Clifford, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd prima del 1447. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 dicembre 1483, nel Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Daltonが1422年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Daltonは32歳，母Alice de Cliffordは52歳であった。1447年以前にWilliam Fychan Ap Pengruffwndと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1483年12月16日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドプルドhオで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Dalton(이)가 1422년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Dalton(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Clifford(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1447년 이전 William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 12월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 프루드호에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Dalton nasceu em 1422, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Dalton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Clifford, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd antes 1447. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1483, em Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Dalton родилась в 1422 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Dalton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Clifford, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd перед 1447 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 16 декабря 1483 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Dalton nació en 1422, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Dalton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice de Clifford, tenía 52 años. Se casó con William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd antes de 1447. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de diciembre de 1483, en Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
